headline: Tapestry Adds Pinterest CTO To Board To Sharpen Digital Gen Z Focus
summary: Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) has appointed Pinterest Chief Technology Officer Matt Madrigal to its Board of Directors. Madrigal, who also held senior roles at Google Shopping and Fanatics, brings experience in e-commerce and digital engagement. The move highlights Tapestry's focus on connecting more effectively with Gen Z and other digitally native consumers. Tapestry, owner of brands that compete in the premium accessories and lifestyle space, is drawing attention with this board addition as...

headline: SFIX Displays Strong Capital Strength With Zero Debt & Solid Cash Flow
summary: Stitch Fix highlights financial strength with $240.5M in cash, zero debt and AI investments that are boosting client engagement and driving higher spend.

headline: 4 Retail Stocks to Boost Your Portfolio as Sales Continue to Soar
summary: ANF, TPR, FIVE, CASY stand out as retail sales hit a 7-month high, with strong spending and rising earnings estimates signaling continued sector momentum.
